---
title: "ECON 2B03: Introduction to Data Analysis and Statistics"
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 2
    link-external-newwindow: true
    link-external-icon: false
---

This is the course website for ECON2B03. I only update it when I’m teaching the course. For official course materials, announcements, and grades, use [Avenue to Learn](https://avenue.mcmaster.ca/).

- [Avenue to Learn](https://avenue.mcmaster.ca/)
- [Course schedule (PDF)](schedule.pdf)
- [Course information (PDF)](course-info.pdf)

Below are the slides and notes, organized by part.

::: {.slides-table}
|  |  |
| --- | :--: |
| **Part A: Descriptive Statistics** |  |
| – A01: Principles of Data | [slides](slides/A_Descriptive_Statistics/A01.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – A02: Visualizing Data | [slides](slides/A_Descriptive_Statistics/A02.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – A04: Numerical data (1) | [slides](slides/A_Descriptive_Statistics/A04.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| **Part B: Probability Theory** |  |
| – B01: Probability Concepts | [slides](slides/B_Probability_Theory/B01.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – B02: Random Variables | [slides](slides/B_Probability_Theory/B02.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – B03: Discrete Random Variables | [slides](slides/B_Probability_Theory/B03.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – B08: Sampling | [slides](slides/B_Probability_Theory/B08.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – B09: The central limit theorem | [slides](slides/B_Probability_Theory/B09.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| **Part C: Inferential Statistics** |  |
| – C01: Confidence intervals | [slides](slides/C_Inferential_Statistics/C01.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – C02: Confidence intervals: means and proportions | [slides](slides/C_Inferential_Statistics/C02.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – C03: Introduction to hypothesis testing | [slides](slides/C_Inferential_Statistics/C03.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
| – C04: The critical value approach | [slides](slides/C_Inferential_Statistics/C04.html){target="_blank" rel="noopener"} |
:::
